title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
